task_description: Generate a TDD implementation plan for the Fabric-v2 cognitive alignment refactor based on the locked analysis decisions: .fabric/rules registry-first rule content, stable_id-only identity, neutral fab_plan_context description index, selection_token, fab_get_rule_sections, rule_selection telemetry, INITIAL_TAXONOMY.md, L2 > L1 > L0 precedence, and Red-Green-Refactor execution.
